name: q
description: Quick side-question alias — `/q <text>` is a short alias for the built-in `/btw <text>` (Claude Code's quick side question without interrupting the current task). Same semantics as /btw — answer briefly (1-3 sentences), then resume the main work. Plugin command (markdown only, no script). Triggers: /q · quick question · 잠깐 · 사이드 질문.
